metric_value: 3,000+ customers by early 1997
notes: Aberdeen states Remedy is 'one of the top suppliers on internal help desk applications, with over 3,000 customers to date.'

metric_name: AR System repeat customer sales rate
metric_value: 53% of sales to existing customers (first 3 quarters 1996)
notes: Indicates strong platform extensibility driving upsell beyond initial help desk use.

metric_value: Highly adaptable; call logging, tracking, escalation, notification, problem resolution, reporting
notes: Aberdeen describes AR System as adaptable across vertical industries: automotive, chemicals, financial, government, telecom, education.

metric_value: Highly and easily adaptable application
notes: Each operation has unique data schemas; application must accommodate specific business process requirements.

metric_value: Wide data source and format access (multi-platform, multi-database)
notes: Inventory may be on mainframe, personnel on Unix/Oracle; solution must span enterprise regardless of platform.

metric_value: Intuitive universal user interface
notes: Aberdeen notes direct correlation between ease-of-use and long-term application success.

metric_value: Ability to embed business rules and procedures
notes: Example: alert if new employee hired without email address, or order not shipped in timeframe.

metric_value: Rapid and continuous modification capability
notes: Internal operations are not static; system must support easy ongoing changes by system administrators.

metric_value: Open system with exposed APIs for enterprise integration
notes: Integration with financial, manufacturing, HR applications requires exposed application programming interfaces.

metric_name: Primary driver of AR System adoption beyond help desk
metric_value: Ease of customization and high adaptability cited by all customers interviewed
notes: Aberdeen interviewed customers from multiple verticals; all cited same reason for expanding AR System use.

metric_value: New screen widgets, view management, HTML User's Guide
notes: Version 3.0 released November 1996; Aberdeen identifies UI, admin, and data access as three major improvements.

metric_name: AR System v3.0 improvement - Data access
metric_value: Multi-table joins without SQL; Direct SQL for cross-enterprise database links
notes: Direct SQL enables links to multiple distributed databases; key differentiator for COM adoption.

metric_name: IT help desk as COM launchpad strategy
metric_value: Help desk identified as natural starting point for internal operations automation
source_page: The Help Desk - A Natural Starting Point
notes: Aberdeen identifies five help desk functions mappable to other operations: recording/scheduling, inventory monitoring, problem resolution, activity tracking, notification.

metric_name: Internal operations targeted for COM automation
metric_value: 9 categories: IT support, facilities, SLA tracking, asset management, inventory, procurement, defect tracking, personnel resource management, policy notification
notes: Aberdeen field research identified these 9 elements as first candidates for automation across enterprises.

metric_name: AR System COM market leadership prediction
metric_value: Remedy expected to become leading supplier of Consolidated Operations Management applications
notes: Aberdeen predicts COM will move up planning agenda of senior executives and AR System will be popular vehicle.

metric_name: AR System COM market leadership actual outcome
metric_value: Remedy grew to 7,000+ customers; acquired by Peregrine for $1B (2001), then sold to BMC Software for $355M (2002); ITSM market converged as predicted but under ServiceNow leadership by 2010s
notes: Source: FundingUniverse company history; BMC CRN announcement Nov 2002. Remedy achieved leadership in ITSM but was ultimately consolidated; ServiceNow displaced it as market leader by 2015.

metric_value: Automotive, computers, chemicals/pharma, energy/utilities, financial services, government, telecom, education
notes: Wide vertical diversification indicated by Aberdeen's interviews with Remedy customer base.

metric_name: AR System extended use cases cited by customers
metric_value: Inventory management, purchase order management, stock reordering, password/network address tracking, asset tracking, change management
notes: Multiple customers interviewed by Aberdeen used AR System well beyond original help desk purpose.

metric_value: AR System v3.0 added pre-defined keywords to simplify embedding workflow processes and business rules
notes: This capability was a key differentiator enabling COM use cases beyond simple help desk.

metric_value: Consolidated operations management will rapidly move up planning agenda of senior executives
notes: Aberdeen predicts COM will become increasingly critical to enterprise competitiveness.

metric_value: ITSM market grew substantially; Gartner ITSM predictions for $9.4B by 2000 were directionally correct; ServiceNow founded 2004 on same COM premise; market reached $14B+ by 2015
notes: The ITSM/COM market growth prediction proved accurate. ServiceNow vindicated Aberdeen's thesis about unified internal operations automation platforms.
